free_text: High flux Japan Material Testing Reactor,
Silicon surface barrier detector - for ALPHA
High purity germanium detector - for gamma rays
actinide admixtures by ion-exchange method, Am-241
Americium atoms were electrodeposited on aluminium
disk 12 mm diam, 0.5 mm thick, sample active diameter
.Corrections were made for self-absorption in sample
and for thermal cross section deviation from 1/v law
Total error. Error structure not given
